summary: Tested platform-wide audit log feature (backend + frontend). All 6 backend tests and all frontend checks passed. The audit log API correctly returns 200 for admin, 401 for unauthenticated users, filters by entity_type/action work, creating a student generates an audit entry. Frontend Audit Log tab loads with filter dropdowns, colour-coded badges, Apply/Clear buttons, and data is shown correctly.

issues: Date inputs use browser native date picker (mm/dd/yyyy placeholder visible) instead of a custom component — minor consistency issue

critical_code_review_comments: audit.py silently swallows all errors (pass in except) — this is intentional per spec but means audit failures are invisible; consider adding a warning log at minimum
GET /api/audit date filter uses string comparison on ISO timestamps — works for ISO format but fragile if timestamp format changes
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test student (TEST_AuditFirst TEST_AuditLast) to generate audit entry
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit log feature fully verified. Backend uses cookie-based sessions (not Bearer tokens). Login endpoint is /api/auth/login-email. audit_log collection now has 1 entry from test. All audit log filters (entity_type, action) work correctly. Frontend shows colour-coded badges: blue 'Student' badge, green 'Created' badge. Clear button appears when filters active and disappears after clear.
passed_tests: GET /api/audit returns 200 with {total, page, per_page, entries} for admin
POST /api/students creates audit entry with entity_type=student, action=created
GET /api/audit?per_page=5 returns <= 5 entries with correct pagination shape
Frontend: Audit Log tab loads without errors
Frontend: Platform Audit Log heading visible
Frontend: Type and Action filter dropdowns present
Frontend: Apply button works — reloads filtered results
Frontend: Clear button appears when filter active and clears on click
Frontend: Blue 'Student' badge and green 'Created' badge visible in table rows
